description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a rectangular frame constructed from light-colored wood. The structure features four evenly spaced horizontal shelves made of a gray material, likely metal or composite, supported by the wooden frame. The open design allows visibility and access from all sides, with no doors or enclosed compartments. The legs are long and straight, elevating the shelves well above the ground, making it suitable for use as a display or storage unit in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public spaces. The overall appearance is minimalist and functional, with a modern aesthetic. There are no visible handles, glass panels, or decorative elements.
description: A tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with four gray shelves and an open, minimalist design. The structure is elevated on long legs and lacks doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, four gray shelves, and the open wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves within the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the four shelves and open structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and shelf arrangement.
